clinicianPlans.label: Solo (Free)
clinicianPlans.description: Single clinician, no additional admin staff. Ideal for early adopters testing Ambulant+.
clinicianPlans.recommendedFor: Part-time virtual clinics and side practices.

clinicianPlans.label: Starter (Premium)
clinicianPlans.description: Clinician + 1 admin assistant for booking, follow-ups and Smart ID dispatch.
clinicianPlans.recommendedFor: Solo practices with one receptionist or practice manager.

clinicianPlans.label: Team
clinicianPlans.description: Designed for small group practices with shared admin pool.

clinicianPlans.label: Group
clinicianPlans.description: High-volume multi-disciplinary practices with more complex admin workflows.
